01 / What We Do

The right solution for your level of growth

Whether you're cleaning up manual processes or scaling to an enterprise data platform — we meet you where you are.

Excel Automation
Eliminate repetitive manual work with custom macros, automated workflows, and smart reporting templates built around your actual processes.
VBA Macros Auto-Reports Data Validation
Power BI Dashboards
Live, interactive dashboards that replace manual status updates — giving your team instant visibility into KPIs, sales, and operations.
KPI Tracking Sales Analytics Operations
Data Intelligence Platform
For businesses ready to scale beyond spreadsheets — we design and implement modern data platforms including Databricks, so your data is centralised, governed, and analytics-ready.
Databricks Data Lakehouse BI Strategy
AI Automation
Put AI to work on the tedious stuff — document processing, report generation, data extraction — so your team focuses on decisions, not data entry.
Doc Processing Auto-Summaries Smart Reports
Want to see it for real? Explore a full messy-Excel → live-dashboard rebuild, plus an AI that writes your monthly business brief — all on sample data.
See our sample work →

02 / What's Coming

Built for Sarawak's unique market

We're expanding our services to meet the real needs of Borneo's SMEs — local software, local grants, local workflows.

WhatsApp & Telegram Business Bots
Get daily sales summaries, inventory alerts, and KPI updates delivered straight to your WhatsApp or Telegram group — no app, no login, just instant insight where your team already works.
WhatsApp Telegram Auto-Alerts
Google Looker Studio Dashboards
A powerful alternative to Power BI for businesses already on Google Workspace. Affordable, cloud-native dashboards that connect directly to Sheets, Drive, and other Google data sources.
Google Workspace Free Tier Cloud Dashboards
Local Software Integration
Connect your existing QNE, SQL Accounting, or StoreHub data to meaningful dashboards and reports. We bridge the gap between your local tools and real business insight.
QNE SQL Accounting StoreHub
Sarawak Grant Report Templates
Applying for SEDC, TERAJU, or SME Corp grants? We help you prepare structured financial and performance reports that meet grant documentation requirements — saving time and increasing approval confidence.
SEDC TERAJU SME Corp
SME Training Workshops
Half-day or full-day data literacy sessions for business owners and teams — in Kuching or online. Partnering with co-working spaces, chambers of commerce, and SME associations across Sarawak.
In-Person Online Kuching
E-Commerce Analytics
Turn your Shopee, Lazada, or TikTok Shop data into actionable insight. Understand your bestsellers, return rates, peak periods, and customer trends — without drowning in raw exports.
Shopee Lazada TikTok Shop
HR & Payroll Reporting
Track leave, overtime, and payroll summaries in clean automated reports — aligned with Malaysian labour law (EA 1955) and built around EPF and SOCSO reporting requirements.
EA 1955 EPF / SOCSO Leave Tracking
Lightweight Database Setup
Stop tracking orders, clients, and inventory in messy spreadsheets. We set up structured, easy-to-use databases using Airtable or smart Google Sheets — no IT department needed.
Airtable Google Sheets No-Code

Interested in any of these? We'd love to hear from you.

Let's Talk →

03 / Why EastStar

Sarawak roots.
Regional reach.

We understand the realities of running a business in Borneo. From quick-win automations to full data platform builds — our solutions are right-sized, priced fairly, and delivered without the enterprise runaround.

01
Local Roots, Wide Reach
Sarawak-based team. We serve clients across Borneo — Sabah, Brunei, Labuan — and beyond to Peninsular Malaysia and Indonesia. Fully remote-capable.
02
Affordable vs ERP
Fraction of the cost of SAP or Oracle. Get 80% of the value with a solution tailored to your actual workflow — not a generic template.
03
Fast Delivery
Most projects delivered in days to weeks, not months. See real results before your next review cycle.
04
Practical Focus
No tech hype. We solve real business problems — late reports, manual errors, missing visibility into your numbers.
05
Direct Support
You work directly with the person who built your solution — not a helpdesk ticket queue.

Our solutions are adapted for the specific reporting and operational needs of Borneo's key business sectors.

Logistics

Construction

05 / How It Works

From WhatsApp to working solution

A simple five-step process with clear communication at every stage — no jargon, no surprises.

1
WhatsApp Consult
Drop us a message. We'll ask about your current pain points.
2
Business Analysis
We review your data, workflows, and reporting needs.
3
Solution Design
We propose the right tool — Excel, Power BI, or AI.
4
Build & Deliver
We build, test, and hand over with a full walkthrough.
5
Ongoing Support
We stay available for updates and questions after delivery.

07 / Common Questions

Answers, before you even ask

The questions every SME owner asks us in the first WhatsApp message — answered upfront.

How much does a typical project cost?

Far less than you'd expect — most Excel automation and dashboard projects cost a fraction of a single ERP licence. After a free consultation we quote one fixed price for the whole project. No hourly billing, no surprises.

How long until we see results?

Quick-win automations ship in days. Most Power BI dashboards take one to three weeks. Larger data platform builds are delivered in phases, so you see working results early — not after months of waiting.

Do you work with businesses outside Sarawak?

Yes. We're fully remote-capable and already work with clients across Sabah, Brunei, Labuan, Peninsular Malaysia, and Indonesia. Consultation, build, and handover can all happen online.

What do we need to prepare before starting?

Just your existing files — even messy ones — and ten minutes to walk us through how you work today. We handle the data cleaning, structuring, and everything technical from there.

Will our team be able to use and maintain it?

Every delivery includes a full walkthrough and documentation, in Bahasa Malaysia or English. You work directly with the person who built your solution, and we stay available after handover.
